title: The Canadian
writer: Arthur Stringer, Julian Johnson, W. Somerset Maugham
actors: Thomas Meighan, Mona Palma, Wyndham Standing
plot: Remake of the 1917 film of 'The Land of Promise' based on the 1913 play by W. Somerset Maugham. A couple undergo hardship homesteading in Alberta, where they are plagued by bad weather and financial woes.
